_doc: Raven Hollow NPC cast roster (BACKLOG #29 ~243 NPCs / #107 the 14 Collector's-Coast zones). DATA only -- names, roles, factions, home zones, personality + signature lines. Deterministic, index-varied generation (tools scratchpad gen_cast.py); no art, no sprites. Consumed by scripts/systems/npc_cast_system.gd; faction ids match data/factions.json; zone ids match scripts/zone_defs.gd.

npcs.name: Dragan Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Keeps the only warm door in The Iron Vein, and keeps her mouth as busy as her hands.
lines: A bed's a copper, silence is free. Which are you buying?
Folk go quiet out past the black bog. You didn't hear that from me.

npcs.name: Mircea Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Believes a good edge is the only honest thing left in The Iron Vein.
lines: Anvil's hot, purse open -- let's trade.
Armor turns a blow. Won't turn what's coming, but it'll do.

npcs.name: Vasile Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Works the back-roads of The Iron Vein and prices rumor by the ounce.
lines: Wares from four roads and none of them safe. Prices to match.
Coin talks, traveler. Everything else just whispers.

npcs.name: Bogdan Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Stands a post nobody thanks him for, in a town nobody defends.
lines: Move along. The Iron Vein is quiet and I mean to keep it that way.
You see anything on the black bog, you come tell me. Anything.

npcs.name: Stelian Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Sworn, underpaid, and too stubborn to run when the others did.
lines: Keep your blade sheathed in my sight, stranger.
They say the dead walk past the black bog. I say I've seen it.

npcs.name: Grigore Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Keeps the chronicle because someone has to remember it right.
lines: I keep the ledger of the dead. It never balances.
Listen past the black bog and you'll hear the old grammar of this place.

npcs.name: Lupu Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Works the black bog from dark to dark and asks nothing but to be left be.
lines: I just work the black bog, ser. I don't want any trouble.
Somethin's wrong with The Iron Vein. You can smell it before you see it.

npcs.name: Sorin Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Has seen enough of The Iron Vein to trust nothing that smiles first.
lines: Don't go past the marker after dark. That's all I'll say.
We were a real town, once. Before The Iron Vein changed.

npcs.name: Petru Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Has buried three husbands and outlasts every winter Vetka can throw.
lines: Sit by the fire, traveler. The cold gets into the bones out there.
Whatever walked through Vetka last week, it didn't pay its bill either.

npcs.name: Iancu Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Lost two fingers to the trade and every ounce of patience with it.
lines: Everything rusts here. Buy twice, cry once.
I don't ask what you kill with it. I just make it sharp.

npcs.name: Nedelcu Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Would sell you the road you're standing on and charge for the dust.
lines: Everything has a price, friend. Even in Vetka. Especially here.
Buy low, sell in Vetka -- that's the whole of my faith.

npcs.name: Vlaicu Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Sworn, underpaid, and too stubborn to run when the others did.
lines: Keep your blade sheathed in my sight, stranger.
They say the dead walk past the open moor. I say I've seen it.

npcs.name: Serban Corbeanu
npcs.personality: Watches the open moor more than the gate; that's where it comes from.
lines: Papers or a reason. This gate stays watched.
Half the watch didn't come back last season. I did. Draw your own lesson.

npcs.personality: Reads the stones of Vetka and writes down what the town would rather forget.

The names on the stones grow shorter each year. Ask yourself why.

npcs.personality: Poor, tired, and honest -- the three things Vetka cannot afford.

My neighbor went out to the open moor and came back... not himself.

npcs.personality: Waters the ale and remembers every face that owes him coin.
lines: Room and a bowl, coin first. We don't run tabs since the troubles.
Drink up. The night's longer than the candle, always.
